Impeccable and comfortable. Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Es la unica estación de servicio que tiene generador eléctrico de el pueblo, por lo que por mas que corten la luz podes seguir cargando

(Translated by Google)
It is the only service station in town that has an electric generator, so even if the power goes out you can continue charging.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcmNQQ3pnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre q llegamos desde Zapala o volvemos desde el norte, está el camión descargando y hay que esperar bastante. Personal indolente

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we arrive from Zapala or return from the north, the truck is unloading and we have to wait a long time. Indifferent staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRajQzSDF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Esperar para cargar combustible mientras los empleados conversan... y después para comer en Full sólo  quedaban 2 sándwiches viejos y recalentados...para colmo la empleada no nos advierte que lo que decía la etiqueta no era lo que había adentro...o sea $135 por un pan con queso y tomate! Lo único bueno (y por eso esta calificación se ganó una estrella, es que ante el reclamo la empleada accedió  a devolver el dinero)

(Translated by Google)
Waiting to fill up with gas while the employees chatted... and then, when we went to eat at Full, there were only two old, reheated sandwiches left... to top it all off, the employee didn't warn us that what the label said wasn't what was inside... I mean, $135 for a bread roll with cheese and tomato! The only good thing (and that's why this rating gets one star, is that after we complained, the employee agreed to give us a refund).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJamNQOFl3EAE

reviews.comment:
En pleno centro de Chos Malal, buen lugar para desayunar o merendar, la única crítica es que son lentos en la recarga de combustible y se generan colas no siempre necesarias.

(Translated by Google)
Located in the heart of Chos Malal, a good place for breakfast or a snack, the only criticism is that they are slow to refuel and queues are generated that are not always necessary.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3aHFMUzhnRRAB
